prioritised-efficiency.name: Prioritised Efficiency
prioritised-efficiency.description:
Each time a LEAGUES OF VOTANN model from your army makes an attack with a weapon that targets the closest eligible target or a target that is within Engagement Range of that model's unit:

• Re-roll a Wound roll of 1

• If your unit is a KÂHL, EINHYR HEARTHGUARD or ÛTHAR THE DESTINED unit, improve the AP of that attack by 1.

rapid-fire.name: Rapid Fire
rapid-fire.description: +X to attacks when targeting units within half range.

ignores-cover.name: Ignores Cover
ignores-cover.description: Targets do not gain the benefit of cover.

pistol.name: Pistol
pistol.description:
Can shoot within Engagement Range, but must target engaged unit.

Cannot be shot alongside other weapons.

lance.name: Lance
lance.description: +1 to wound after making a charge move.

indirect-fire.name: Indirect Fire
indirect-fire.description: Can target units that are not visible to the attacker with -1 to hit and the target gains the benefit of cover.

precision.name: Precision
precision.description:
Can choose to allocate wounds to a unit's leader model.

The character must be visible to the attacker.

blast.name: Blast
blast.description:
Add 1 attack per 5 models in target unit.

Cannot target a unit in engagement range of allied unit.

melta.name: Melta
melta.description: +'x' to damage when targeting units within half range.

heavy.name: Heavy
heavy.description: +1 to hit if the bearer remained stationary.

hazardous.name: Hazardous
hazardous.description:
After attacking, roll a D6 for each hazardous weapon. For each 1, destroy one model.

(Characters, Monsters and Vehicles suffer 3 mortal wounds instead)

extra-attacks.name: Extra Attacks
extra-attacks.description: Can fight with this weapon in addition to other weapons.

anti-keyword.name: Anti-[Keyword] X+
anti-keyword.description: Wound rolls of 'x+' score a critical wound against targets with the specified keyword.

anti-vehicle.name: Anti-Vehicle 3+
anti-vehicle.description: Against VEHICLE, unmodified Wound roll of 3+ = Critical Wound.

anti-monster.name: Anti-Monster 3+
anti-monster.description: Against MONSTER, unmodified Wound roll of 3+ = Critical Wound.

feel-no-pain.name: Feel No Pain 6+
feel-no-pain.description: Each time this model would lose a wound, roll a D6. On a 6+, that wound is not lost.

deep-strike.name: Deep Strike
deep-strike.description: Can be set up in Reserves. Deploy 9"+ from enemies during Reinforcements step.

teleport-crest.name: Teleport Crest
teleport-crest.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have the Deep Strike ability.

rampart-crest.name: Rampart Crest
rampart-crest.description: While the bearer is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

weavefield-crest.name: Weavefield Crest
weavefield-crest.description: Models in the bearer's unit have a 5+ invulnerable save.

weavefield-crest-theyn.name: Weavefield Crest (Theyn)
weavefield-crest-theyn.description: Models in the bearer's unit have a 5+ invulnerable save. Note: The Theyn has this, but Ûthar's Rampart Crest already provides 5+ to the unit.

kindred-hero.name: Kindred Hero
kindred-hero.description: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the [LETHAL HITS] ability.

seized-opportunity.name: Seized Opportunity
seized-opportunity.description: Once per phase, one model from your army with this ability can use it when its unit destroys an enemy unit. If it does, you gain 1YP.

exemplar-of-the-einhyr.name: Exemplar of the Einhyr
exemplar-of-the-einhyr.description: While this model is leading a unit, add 1 to Advance and Charge rolls made for that unit.

mass-driver-accelerators.name: Mass Driver Accelerators
mass-driver-accelerators.description: Each time this model ends a Charge move, select one enemy unit within Engagement Range and roll D6: 2-5 = D3 mortal wounds, 6 = D3+3 mortal wounds.

ancestral-fortune.name: Ancestral Fortune
ancestral-fortune.description: Once per turn, you can spend 1YP to change one Hit roll, one Wound roll or one saving throw made for this model to an unmodified 6.

grim-efficiency.name: Grim Efficiency
grim-efficiency.description: Once per battle round, when a friendly LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit within 12" is targeted with a Stratagem, reduce the CP cost of that Stratagem by 1CP.

decisive-destruction.name: Decisive Destruction
decisive-destruction.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

panspectral-scanning.name: Panspectral Scanning
panspectral-scanning.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

multispectral-visor.name: Multispectral Visor
multispectral-visor.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

forgewrought-expertise.name: Forgewrought Expertise
forgewrought-expertise.description: At the end of your Movement phase, this unit can repair one friendly LEAGUES OF VOTANN VEHICLE, EXOFRAME, or IRONKIN STEELJACKS unit within 3". One model regains up to D3 lost wounds, or up to 3 lost wounds if this unit contains an Ironkin Assistant.

breaching-fire.name: Breaching Fire
breaching-fire.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit cannot have the Benefit of Cover.

conversion.name: Conversion
conversion.description: Each time an attack made with this weapon targets an enemy unit that is not within 12", an unmodified Hit roll of 4+ scores a Critical Hit.

invuln-5.name: 5+ Invulnerable Save
invuln-5.description: Models in this unit have a 5+ invulnerable save while led by this Character (from Rampart Crest).

reroll-wound-1.name: Re-roll Wound Roll of 1
reroll-wound-1.description: While led by Iron-master, ranged attacks can re-roll Wound rolls of 1 (from Multispectral Visor).

psychic.name: Psychic
psychic.description: This weapon has the PSYCHIC tag. Rules that interact with psychic weapons apply.

one-shot.name: One Shot
one-shot.description: This weapon can only be shot once per battle.

overcharge.name: Overcharge
overcharge.description: This is the overcharge profile of a weapon with multiple charge levels.

lone-operative.name: Lone Operative
lone-operative.description: Unless part of an Attached unit, this unit can only be selected as the target of a ranged attack if the attacking model is within 12".

stealth.name: Stealth
stealth.description: If every model in this unit has this ability, then each time a ranged attack is made against it, subtract 1 from the Hit roll.

infiltrators.name: Infiltrators
infiltrators.description: During deployment, this unit can be set up anywhere on the battlefield that is more than 9" from all enemy models.

scouts-9.name: Scouts 9"
scouts-9.description: At the start of the first battle round, before the first turn begins, this unit can make a Normal move of up to 9".

firing-deck-5.name: Firing Deck 5
firing-deck-5.description: Each time this model is selected to shoot in the Shooting phase, up to 5 embarked models can shoot as well.

feel-no-pain-4.name: Feel No Pain 4+
feel-no-pain-4.description: Each time this model would lose a wound, roll a D6. On a 4+, that wound is not lost.

deadly-demise-1.name: Deadly Demise 1
deadly-demise-1.description: When this model is destroyed, roll a D6. On a 6, each unit within 6" suffers 1 mortal wound.

deadly-demise-d6.name: Deadly Demise D6
deadly-demise-d6.description: When this model is destroyed, roll a D6. On a 6, each unit within 6" suffers D6 mortal wounds.

smoke-launcher.name: Smoke Launcher
smoke-launcher.description: Once per battle, after your opponent selects this unit as a target, until the end of the phase the unit has the Benefit of Cover and the Stealth ability.

panspectral-scanner.name: Panspectral Scanner
panspectral-scanner.description: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

multiwave-comms-array.name: Multiwave Comms Array
multiwave-comms-array.description: Each time you target the bearer's unit with a Stratagem, roll one D6: on a 5+, you gain 1CP.

rollbar-searchlight.name: Rollbar Searchlight
rollbar-searchlight.description: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

preymark-crest.name: Preymark Crest
preymark-crest.description: While an enemy unit is within 18" and visible to the bearer, each time a model in the bearer's unit makes an attack that targets that enemy unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

science-guild-support.name: Science Guild Support
science-guild-support.description: Once per battle, after your opponent selects a unit as the target of a Stratagem, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, each time an attack is made against that enemy unit, improve the AP of that attack by 1.

resource-transmutation.name: Resource Transmutation
resource-transmutation.description: Each time an enemy model is destroyed by an attack made by this model, you gain 1YP.

grudge-fuelled-fortitude.name: Grudge-fuelled Fortitude
grudge-fuelled-fortitude.description: Each time an attack is allocated to this model, subtract 1 from the Damage characteristic of that attack.

unhinged-vengeance.name: Unhinged Vengeance
unhinged-vengeance.description: Each time this model makes a melee attack, if this model's unit was below its Starting Strength at the start of your turn, add 1 to the Wound roll.

brokhyr-guild-support.name: Brôkhyr Guild Support
brokhyr-guild-support.description: While this model is leading a unit, weapons equipped by models in that unit have the ability to re-roll Wound rolls of 1.

fortify-psychic.name: Fortify (Psychic)
fortify-psychic.description: While this model is leading a unit, models in that unit have a 4+ invulnerable save.

grimnyrs-regard.name: Grimnyr's Regard
grimnyrs-regard.description: Once per battle, at the start of any phase, this model can use this ability. If it does, until the end of the phase, enemy units within 18" of this model cannot use any abilities that let them ignore wounds.

computational-mastermind.name: Computational Mastermind
computational-mastermind.description: While this model is leading a unit, each time a model in that unit makes an attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

predictive-guidance.name: Predictive Guidance
predictive-guidance.description: Once per battle round, you can target this model's unit with the Command Re-roll Stratagem for 0CP.

cyberstimms.name: Cyberstimms
cyberstimms.description: Each time a model in this unit is destroyed by a melee attack, if that model has not fought this phase, roll one D6: on a 4+, do not remove it from play. The destroyed model can fight after the attacking model's unit has finished making its attacks, and is then removed from play.

subterranean-explosives.name: Subterranean Explosives
subterranean-explosives.description: In your Shooting phase, one model in this unit equipped with a mole grenade launcher can use it. If it does, select one point on the battlefield within 18" and roll one D6 for each enemy unit within 3" of that point: on a 2+, that unit suffers D3 mortal wounds.

destabilising-quakes.name: Destabilising Quakes
destabilising-quakes.description: In your Shooting phase, after this unit has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, that enemy unit is reduced to half its Move characteristic.

geomantic-hunters.name: Geomantic Hunters
geomantic-hunters.description: This unit is eligible to shoot in a turn in which it Fell Back.

luck-has-need-keeps-toil-earns.name: Luck Has. Need Keeps. Toil Earns.
luck-has-need-keeps-toil-earns.description: At the start of each battle round, you gain 1YP for each objective marker you control that has one or more models from this unit within range of it.

outflanking-mag-riders.name: Outflanking Mag-riders
outflanking-mag-riders.description: At the end of your opponent's turn, if this unit is within 6" of any battlefield edge and is not within Engagement Range of one or more enemy units, you can remove this unit from the battlefield and place it into Strategic Reserves.

pragmatic-hunters.name: Pragmatic Hunters
pragmatic-hunters.description: This unit is eligible to shoot and declare a charge in a turn in which it Fell Back.

purge-response.name: Purge Response
purge-response.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a ranged attack that targets the closest eligible target, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

merciless-eradication.name: Merciless Eradication
merciless-eradication.description: Each time a model in this unit makes a melee attack, if this unit made a Charge move this turn, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

scanner-uplinks.name: Scanner Uplinks
scanner-uplinks.description: In your Shooting phase, after this model has shot, select one enemy unit hit by one or more of those attacks. Until the start of your next Shooting phase, each time a friendly LEAGUES OF VOTANN unit makes an attack that targets that unit, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.

opportunistic-manoeuvre.name: Opportunistic Manoeuvre
opportunistic-manoeuvre.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack against a unit that is Below Half-strength, re-roll a Hit roll of 1 and re-roll a Wound roll of 1.

blistering-advance.name: Blistering Advance
blistering-advance.description: Units can disembark from this TRANSPORT after it has made a Normal move (but not an Advance or Fall Back move), and the disembarked unit is still eligible to act normally.

multicog-targeting.name: Multicog Targeting
multicog-targeting.description: Each time this model makes a ranged attack, you can ignore any or all modifiers to the following: that attack's Ballistic Skill characteristic; the Hit roll.

reroll-hit-1.name: Re-roll Hit 1
reroll-hit-1.description: Each time a model in the bearer's unit makes a ranged attack, re-roll a Hit roll of 1.
